comments: Free tier (10 audits/month, no credit card) is available at accessspark.io for evaluation. Built on axe-core plus additional checks, running real Chrome via Playwright, with authenticated-page scanning, site crawling, and VPAT/ACR export.
features: AccessSpark is an automated accessibility auditor that scans any web page for WCAG 2.2/2.1/2.0 issues alongside SEO, security, and performance. Use it as a hosted online tool, a Chrome extension, a bookmarklet, or in CI. It crawls whole sites and authenticated pages, scores results, explains each issue, and generates VPAT/ACR reports.
title: AccessSpark
